nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: CR
nodes.summary: CR表示 IUCN 极危等级，当前关联174种鸟类，如勺嘴鹬、加州神鹫、菲律宾鹰等174种鸟类。

nodes.name: Príncipe thrush
nodes.summary: Príncipe thrush（Príncipe thrush，学名 Turdus xanthorhynchus），在图谱中标记为极危（CR）物种，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏。

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Although some attribute this to habitat loss, the latest evidence from knowledgeable local guides suggests that the threat is from nest predation by the rapidly increasing population of invasive monkeys, which have been caught on camera traps stealing eggs
